reviews.title: I don’t recommend anyone to stay here
reviews.positives: Locate in a good neighborhood, not so noisy but not so far away from tourists attractions
reviews.negatives:
1. The price displayed on Booking.com doesn’t reflect the actual cost when pay at the property, even in VND. Moreover, the room doesn’t match the description in the picture.
2. The staff was unhelpful and provided no information. They didn’t give us the Wi-Fi password, check-out time, or anything else.
3. The room was extremely dirty and smelled bad. The walls were so thin that you could not only hear the neighbors but also understand them.
4. The bathroom was filled with dust, the shower was broken, the floor was slippery, and the door couldn’t be locked. The toilet paper was thin and not enough.
5. I booked for six people, but they only provided four towels. When I asked for more, the receptionist gave me dirty towels with black stains on them.
6. There was no daily cleaning service, so there were no towels changed, toilet paper, trash disposal, or drinking water provided (also at the check-in).

reviews.title: Misleading Listing – Got Relocated Upon Check-In
reviews.text:
I booked this hotel because the photos and location looked amazing. However, when I arrived, I was told that the room I reserved was not available and that the hotel was fully booked. Without any prior notice, they transferred me to a completely different property.

The new location was not what I expected — it didn’t match the quality, ambiance, or even the area shown in the original listing. It felt like a bait-and-switch tactic.

Very disappointing experience. If the room is not available, guests should be informed in advance. Transparency is key in hospitality.

reviews.title: Awful, READ BEFORE BOOKING
reviews.text:
I booked an apartment with a kitchen, a separate living room, a bedroom, a bathroom, and a view. Instead, I received a small dark room with just a fridge and a shower. The windows face a blank wall, there’s no access to fresh air, it’s extremely cold inside, the bathroom floor tiles squish with water, and the hot water in the shower works for only about 5 minutes before turning cold. The internet barely works.

I arrived late at night, and there was no lobby and no staff on site. I waited for half an hour for anyone to show up, and I had to ask random passersby to call the hotel’s number just to let them know I had arrived (thank you to the kind people of Vietnam). When an employee finally came, he checked me into a room that had nothing to do with what I had booked.

I told him about the issue, and first he said there were no free rooms. Then he told me that this room was actually better and that the hotel had upgraded me (just how). Then he said that the room I booked was unsafe to stay in, because the police told it was fire-hazardous (what) and finally he said he could move me only on Sunday because it was occupied. I asked about compensation or a refund since the accommodation did not match the description at all, and I want to find a different place. Of course he said he couldn’t do anything because he wasn’t the manager, and only the manager could… and so on.

Naturally, on Sunday he wasn’t there, and no one else was either. No one refunded the difference or changed my room. Meanwhile, I checked and saw that the apartment with the view and the terrace - the one I originally booked - was available for booking day-to-day during my stay and even at the moment I arrived. That’s the kind of “business” they run.

They ruined my week in Hanoi. Do not rent this place. It’s not even a real hotel - there is no service, no lobby, and absolutely zero responsibility. Google Maps is full of reviews from people who payed in advance and weren’t checked in at all; I just wish I had read them before the trip to book a different place.

reviews.title: Pathetic property experience
reviews.text:
The service was pathetic. Upon arriving at the apartment, the receptionist informed us that they were fully booked and suggested we shift to another one of their new properties. We agreed, but when we reached the new apartment, we were shocked to find that the room had nothing except a bed and an AC. The shower was broken, and there was no drinking water available.

We tried to contact the receptionist but couldn’t reach him. Eventually, we managed to get his WhatsApp number and reported the issue with the shower. Since it was late at night and we had no other options, we had no choice but to stay for the night.

Overall, it was a terrible experience. Throughout our stay in Vietnam, all the other accommodations were excellent, but this property was a major disappointment.

reviews.title: Health risk
reviews.text:
The room I was initially assigned had visible mold and dampness on the walls and ceiling, as shown in the attached photos. This condition poses a serious health risk, as exposure to mold can cause respiratory irritation, allergic reactions, headaches, sinus problems, and can worsen asthma or other breathing conditions—especially in an enclosed sleeping space.
I requested a room change, but my request was declined by the property. I then contacted Agoda customer service, after which the room was changed. While the new room was an improvement, the bathroom was very old and had a strong sewage odor. Additionally, the water supply stopped temporarily. In the middle of my shower, the hot water stopped, forcing me to finish with cold water. The internet connection throughout my stay was also unstable.
Thanks God I only booked for 2 nights and won’t never come back.

reviews.title: Not really a hotel
reviews.text:
This property doesn’t really qualify as a hotel. There’s no proper front desk or reception area — you have to call a number before anyone attends to you. Before arriving, I informed them that we would be taking an early flight and coming in around 9:30am just to leave our luggage since I understand that check-in was at 2pm. After an hour of calling the “reception,” someone finally came down (who looked like he had just woken up) only to remind us that check-in was at 2pm. We were told to leave our bags in the CCTV room, but it wasn’t locked and no one was monitoring the cameras — we checked. It didn’t feel very secure.

That said, the room itself was decent enough for a short stay — clean and comfortable although there were no windows, and the location is very convenient, especially since it’s close to the train station. This was the main reason we booked it, as we were taking the sleeper train to Sapa. For that purpose, it served us fine, but I wouldn’t recommend it for anyone looking for a proper hotel experience.

reviews.title: Convenient Location, But Had Booking Issues
reviews.text:
I originally chose this hotel because it’s very close to Hanoi Train Station perfect for my plan to check out early at 5 AM and catch Bus 86 to the airport from right in front of the station. The location was the main reason I booked it, and from the outside, the building looked new and clean, which made it seem like a good value for the money.

However, after I made the booking, the staff contacted me to say there was an issue with the electricity and suggested I stay at their other hotel, which was located a bit farther away. Since I needed to walk with my bags early in the morning, I declined their offer. They then asked me to cancel the booking myself, but because I had booked on the same day, the system didn’t allow me to cancel. I asked them to handle the cancellation instead, and their reply was a short "NO PROBLEM!" typed in all capital letters.

In the end, since it wasn't possible to stay there, we had to book another hotel at the last minute.

Overall, for location alone, this hotel would have been a very convenient option if everything had gone smoothly. However, it would have been better if they had taken the listing down from Agoda once they knew about the electricity issue.

reviews.title: It seems okay for spending a day...
reviews.text: First of all, I am traveling alone, and I made a same-day reservation, but the price is really reasonable... However, I was surprised to find that I was assigned to room 2 on the 8th floor, which had 3 beds. If you're looking for a cost-effective travel spot for 3 people, this place would be the best... but for family trips, I would suggest looking for another place... As for the accommodation, there was 1 bathroom, a dining table for 4 in the living room, a refrigerator, no TV, and I don't know about the Wi-Fi because I didn't use it... but it probably exists?? A downside is that there was a small moth in the bathroom? You know what I mean? That bug flew into the room... but since it's Vietnam, I can overlook it... The location is close to Quan An Ngon and near the train tracks. If you're planning to travel by train, this place is good. Also........... what else is there........ The staff was kind when checking in. They somewhat resemble an actor in a soap opera....... It’s not important, but anyway, oh! They didn’t provide water.... and there were 6 toothbrushes, 2 razors, 2 soaps, and 4 towels. That's about it for the review~ haha. The cost-performance is really good. But don't have high expectations~!ㅎ

reviews.title: トラブルもスタッフの対応がひどい
reviews.text:
家族6人で4泊しました。同価格帯での宿泊経験はありますので、料金に対する、施設サービスについては期待していませんでした。

しかし

①入室直後、部屋の照明電球が2個切れていて、薄暗い、かつ切れかけているものがあるので、チラチラ落ち着かない。

→フロントスタッフに申し出たところ、翌朝対応するといいながら、以降何度伝えても一切対応なし。

②タオルが破れてボロボロ

→予備がないから今日は無理。翌日以降、タオル交換お願いしてもいつになるかわからないと。何度も伝えてこちらがもらいに行きようやく交換。

③停電

→スタッフに聞いてもいつ復旧かわからない。幸い短時間で復旧

④断水

reviews.title: 변기에 남자 소변 묻어있는 숙소.
reviews.text: 엘베는 9층까지 있고 제 방은 10층. 캐리어가 30키로는 되는데ㅜㅜ 가서 봤더니 안에 불은 켜져있고 키는 방 안에 꽂혀있음. 관리자도 문을 똑똑 두드리며 들어감. 헤어드라이기 없길래 길 건너 현지인통해 전화부탁하여 달라했으나 다음날 오후에 받음. 에어컨 컨트롤러 없어서 덜덜 떨며 잠. 이건 퇴실때까지 주지 않음(그건 뭐 너네 손해니.) 이불도 안 깔려있고 침대 시트와 배게 시트 더럽. 물어보니 내일 청소해 주겠다고... 이불은 내가 장에서 꺼냄. 아침에 변기보니 남자 소변자국 있음. 결국 청소 안된 상태의 방을 나에게 준 것... 아무래도 남자 관리자들이 쉬던 공간을 급히 나에게 준 듯. 빈 방 있음 다음날 바꿔주겠다니 없다고 함. 따지니 단골에게 말해서 방을 바꿔줄수 있다며 9층으로 안내. 헤어드라이기는 비치되어 있지 않다면서 여긴 있음. 중요한건 태도가 개차반. 심드렁하고 성의없고 개싸가지. 어디 놀던 양아치인줄. 아고다의 대처도 아주 실망스러움. 방 바꾸고 키 달라니 곱게 안 주고 방 안쪽이 안 잠겨 문의하니 귀찮아하는게 역력함. 나도 너한테 말 안 걸고 싶어요~~~ 올라오면서 중얼중얼. 내일 나갈때 중얼거려야지 나도!

reviews.title: The worst hotel I stayed at during my month-long stay in Vietnam
reviews.text:
The room is completely different from the photos. The actual room is very small and old. The air conditioner is covered in mold. It smells strongly of mold.  My one-night stay, I saw cockroaches and ants. The bed sheets were not changed, so I saw other people's hair. The soundproofing is poor, so it is very noisy, and I could hear noise from the next room.

일단 아고다에 나와있는 사진과 실제방은 완전히 다름. 방안에는 창문이 없고 사진보다 엄청 작고 좁음. 방이 왜 사진과 다르냐고 하면 나몰라 시전하고 와이드앵글로 찍어서 그렇다고 헛소리 시전함 ㅋㅋㅋ 방안에 들어가자말자 심한 곰팡이 냄새에 머리가 아팠고 에어콘은 여지껏 한번도 청소한적없는지 곰팡이 범벅임.
화장실은 더 가관임. 곳곳에 곰팡이와 녹이 슬어있고 배수구에는 머리카락도 그대로며 무엇보다 하수구냄새+곰팡이 냄새가 진동을 함. 방을 바꿔달라고 해서 바꿨는데 바꾼방도 똑같길래 더이상 바꾸는걸 포기하고 하룻밤 잤는데 일어나서 깜짝놀람 바닥에 바퀴벌레 2~3마리 기어다니는거 보고 기겁해서 짐싸서 뛰쳐나옴 ㅠ 베트남에서 지내면서 가장 불쾌했던 경험이었음

reviews.text:
Khi mình book phòng từ 30/7/2025 cho 1 đêm của ngày 1/9/2025 đến 2/9/2025. Nhưng đến ngày 8/9/2025 mới gửi mail cho mình để xin Sđt. mình đã trả lời qua (SMS, MAIL, AGODA và GỌI ĐIỆN TRỰC TIẾP), bạn sale khách sạn nghe điện thoại và trả lời OKAY, EM THẤY TIN NHẮN CHỊ RỒI.
Vậy mà tới ngày chuẩn bị qua chỗ địa chỉ nhận phòng thì nhận được câu trả lời KHÔNG TRÁCH NHIỆM. Khách sạn đặt lợi nhuận, tham tiền lên trên uy tín, trong khi đơn đặt phòng Agoda mình vẫn còn đó mà trả lời là KHÔNG CÓ PHÒNG. Từ miền Nam ra hưởng ứng Đại lễ 2/9, cuối cùng vì vậy mà hành lí đồ đạt ngủ ngoài đường. Có lẽ khách sạn tham được thời, chừa phòng để cho khách thuê trực tiếp để được giá cao chăng ??
Đừng đổ thừa cho bạn Sale nào cả, khi mình tha thiết tìm hướng giải quyết với khách sạn, nhưng Khách sạn chọn "im họng". Coi lại cách làm việc đã chuyên nghiệp chưa.
Vì bên mục thanh toán với khách sạn này, k có mục chọn thanh toán ngay, chứ mình thường thanh toán ngay vì xác xuất sold out và bắt khách hủy (là còn có lương tâm xíu), còn Khách sạn Eco này nói thẳng là MẤT DẠY, để tới sát giờ mới "mở họng" trả lời.

MỌI THÔNG TIN, THỜI GIAN ĐẶT PHÒNG, TIN NHẮN VỚI KHÁCH SẠN MÌNH CÓ ĐỂ PHÍA DƯỚI. AI CÓ Ý ĐỊNH BOOK NÊN SUY NGHĨ KĨ. ĐỪNG ĐỂ RA HÀ NỘI LANG THANG K NƠI Ở GIỐNG MÌNH.

reviews.negatives:
Отель сначала попросил отменить бронь, так как якобы я приезжаю слишком поздно. Хотя во первых я сообщал время прибытия сразу после бронирования, затем дополнительно перез поездкой. 

После переписки, мне сказали, что нашли другой отель. Это было перед посадкой в самолет. 
По прилету оказалось, что с этим номером что-то не то и меня не могут заселить. 
Предложили ещё 2 варианта. Я выбрал и мне, якобы забронировали номер. Приехав по адресу, мне сказали, что никакой брони нет. 

Далее на сообщения никто не отвечал. 

В итоге я остался без жилья в новой стране и новом для меня городе. Хорошо, хоть, что отель нужен был на день, так как вечером ехал далее

reviews.title: Đây là trải nghiệm đầy tồi tệ nhất
reviews.text:
Các bạn thân mến!
Chúng tôi thuê căn hộ 1 giường ngủ, có ban công, được bán trên app Agoda tại khách sạn này ở 91 - Phố Lý Thường Kiệt. Chúng tôi ở lại đây 3 ngày.
11h30 chúng tôi có mặt khách sạn. Chúng tôi thuê thêm xe máy để đi ăn trưa. 13h45 chúng tôi quay lại ks nhận phòng. Quy định 14h nhận phòng, nhưng 14h45 mới nhận được vì lý do: phòng WC bị tắt nước, đang sửa. Phải đợi.
Chúng tôi thuê loại Căn hộ 1 giường ngủ, chứ không phải phòng khách sạn. Nhưng tiện nghi như sau:
1- Ti vi bị hỏng không xem được
2- Tủ lạnh loại nhỏ, nhưng cũng không xài được.
3- WC có dây điện bị hở lõi đồng rất nguy hiểm. Có một lỗ to như ảnh (chắc để nối điện và dây nóng lạnh điều hoà)
4- Nút nhấn xả nước trên bồn cầu bị hư, bể.
5- Bình nấu nước nóng bị oxi hoá quá không dám nấu nước. Nhưng trong phòng không có nước suối để uống (mình có hỏi, lễ tân bảo bên em không phải dịch vụ nên không có nước, câu trả lời này mình không hiểu luôn).
6- Căn hộ nằm trên tầng 10, mà thang máy chỉ đến tầng 9. Phải đi bộ. Chắc là phòng được xây thêm sau này.
Chính vì thế mà phòng nằm cạnh phòng để mô- tơ thang máy. Điều này gây ồn ào khi thang máy vận hành liên tục. Không thể ngủ được. Nửa đêm còn giật mình vì tiếng thanh máy.
7- Phòng rất ẩm, lót sàn gỗ, nhưng có một tổ Kiến Lửa ở phía trên đầu giường nên kiến bò ra khắp phòng. Bò cả lên giường ngủ. Có báo cáo lại nhưng chỉ có  trả lời: "dạ dạ "
8- Mình báo muốn đổi căn hộ thì Lễ Tân bảo không có căn hộ tương đương vì giá căn hộ mình cao nhất rồi. Có đưa mình xem loại phòng khác nhưng rất hẹp và cảm giác khó chịu. Nên mình không đổi.
 Và đây là trải nghiệm tệ nhất khi ra Hà Nội. Hai lần trước mình ra Hà Nội thuê phòng khách sạn cũng rất ok. Lần này vì muốn gần ga, Văn Miếu nên mình book khách sạn này. Hic

reviews.title: Don’t do it
reviews.negatives:
We booked an apartment with a balcony and view, including a kitchen and bath. Upon arrival, we were told there was an “issue” and were moved to a different building a five-minute walk away.

The replacement room was significantly worse and did not include the amenities we had paid for (no kitchen, no bath), yet we were still asked to pay the full price.

Because it was late at night and over New Year’s, we had no realistic alternative and felt forced to stay. We were then asked by the accommodation to cancel our Booking.com reservation (we refused). Shortly after, we saw the original apartment relisted online.

Based on our experience, this feels like misleading advertising and a bait-and-switch situation. They advertise one room and then give you another significantly worse room. I would not recommend staying here.
